name: Sunday Morning Service - September 8, 2024
description: Pastor James Wilkins delivers the sermon 'Walking by Faith' at Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi MS. Recorded and uploaded by Calvin Hargrove.

name: Sunday Morning Service - September 22, 2024
description: Pastor James Wilkins preaches 'The Armor of God' from Ephesians 6. Full Sunday morning worship service at Shiloh Baptist Church.

name: Homecoming Sunday Service 2024
description: Annual Homecoming Sunday at Shiloh Baptist Church. Guest speaker Rev. Marcus Booth from Meridian. Choir reunion and full dinner on the grounds follow.

name: Shiloh Baptist Choir Rehearsal - October 2024
description: Mid-week choir rehearsal led by Minister of Music Deacon Earl Simmons. Preparing for the fall revival. Recorded by Calvin Hargrove.

name: Fall Revival Night 1 - October 2024
description: Opening night of Shiloh Baptist Fall Revival. Guest evangelist Rev. Thomas Greer from Hattiesburg. Powerful message on repentance.

name: Fall Revival Night 2 - October 2024
description: Second night of Shiloh Baptist Fall Revival. Rev. Thomas Greer continues the series 'Come Back Home.' Includes testimonies and altar call.

name: Sunday Morning Service - November 10, 2024
description: Veterans Day Sunday at Shiloh Baptist Church. Pastor James Wilkins honors veteran members of the congregation. Special musical tribute.

name: Thanksgiving Service 2024 - Shiloh Baptist
description: Annual Thanksgiving service at Shiloh Baptist Church. Community worship, giving of thanks, and a message from Pastor James Wilkins on gratitude and God's provision.

name: Christmas Cantata - Shiloh Baptist Choir 2024
description: Shiloh Baptist Church presents 'Joy to the World: A Christmas Celebration.' The sanctuary choir performs the annual Christmas cantata. Directed by Deacon Earl Simmons.

name: Christmas Sunday Service 2024
description: Christmas Sunday morning worship at Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi MS. Pastor James Wilkins delivers 'The Gift That Keeps Giving.' Special music and candlelight close.

name: Watch Night Service 2024 - New Year's Eve
description: Shiloh Baptist Church Watch Night Service, December 31, 2024. Bringing in the New Year in prayer and worship. Pastor James Wilkins preaches 'What Will You Do With 2025?'

name: Sunday Morning Service - February 2, 2025
description: Pastor James Wilkins preaches 'Pressing Toward the Mark' from Philippians 3. Full Sunday morning service at Shiloh Baptist Church.

name: Easter Sunrise Service 2025 - Shiloh Baptist
description: Easter Sunrise Service at Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi MS. Dawn worship on the church lawn, followed by full morning service. Pastor James Wilkins: 'He Is Risen Indeed.'

name: Building Fund Dedication Service - May 2025
description: Special dedication service for the Shiloh Baptist Church new fellowship hall construction project. Building committee presentation and blessing of the groundbreaking.

name: Sunday Morning Service - July 6, 2025
description: Independence Sunday at Shiloh Baptist Church. Pastor James Wilkins preaches 'Free Indeed' from John 8:36. Patriotic hymns and congregational singing.

name: Shiloh Baptist Choir - Fall Concert 2025
description: Annual fall concert featuring the Shiloh Baptist Sanctuary Choir and Youth Ensemble. Directed by Deacon Earl Simmons. A full evening of gospel music.

name: Christmas Sunday Service 2025
description: Christmas Sunday at Shiloh Baptist Church. Pastor James Wilkins delivers 'Born for This Moment.' Choir performs Christmas anthems. Uploaded by Calvin Hargrove.

name: Easter Sunday Service 2026 - Shiloh Baptist Church
description: Easter Sunday morning worship at Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi MS. Pastor James Wilkins preaches 'The Stone Was Rolled Away.' Full choir, baptisms, and altar call.

name: Sunday Morning Service - May 10, 2026 - Mother's Day
description: Mother's Day Sunday service at Shiloh Baptist Church. Special recognition of mothers of the congregation. Pastor James Wilkins: 'A Woman of Virtue.' Uploaded by Calvin Hargrove.

name: Sunday Morning Service - June 1, 2026
description: June 1st Sunday morning service at Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi MS. Pastor James Wilkins continues the series 'Living Water.' Full worship and congregational prayer.

name: Sunday Morning Service - June 8, 2026
description: June 8th Sunday morning service at Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi MS. Pastor James Wilkins preaches 'Anchored in the Storm.' Deacon board anniversary recognition.

name: Gulf Coast Baptist - Sunday Sermon - October 13, 2024
description: Pastor William Foote preaches 'Standing Firm' at Gulf Coast Baptist Fellowship, Gulfport MS.

name: Southern Gospel Quartet Showcase - Jackson MS 2025
description: Annual Southern Gospel quartet showcase featuring groups from across Mississippi. Recorded live at New Providence Baptist Church, Jackson MS.

name: Mississippi Gospel Choir Roundup - Summer 2025
description: Featuring choir performances from six coastal Mississippi churches including Shiloh Baptist Biloxi, New Hope Biloxi, and Cornerstone Baptist. Compiled by Mississippi Gospel Music Channel.

name: Mississippi Mass Choir - 40th Anniversary Concert
description: The Mississippi Mass Choir celebrates 40 years of gospel ministry. Full concert recording from the Jackson Convention Center. A milestone evening of praise.
